text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hiyaaap!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Phew... And that was my secret technique,
Bakushin Ring Toss!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
W-wow! My eyes couldn't keep up with how fast
you threw all six rings!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Th-though, they all missed the mark...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pew! Pew! Pew! Pew! Zap!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
All hits confirmed. Targets down. Operation
Target Shooting was a success.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Amazing! Bourbon, you're so cool!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Are you sure you used the right gun, though?! And are those holes in the prizes?!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Look at this wafer cutout design I made! You can
get the wafers from the stand over there.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Wow, a bird! You even etched out all its feathers.
It's so pretty!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, hehe. I got so engrossed in carving
out the design, I couldn't help myself.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Emotional response... verified. The object meets
the requirements to be considered a work of art. I
recommend photographic preservation.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then how about you include my wafer design in
the shot too!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
When did you even have the time?! But... huh?
You're not holding anything.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That is not by mistake! I added a little Bakushin
and the whole thing turned to dust!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Don't you think you've Bakushined a little too
much? And I don't just mean this time...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Rice, you sure know how to chow down!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? I... I do?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Course you do! You were just holding a meat bun
a second ago! Or—don't tell me—that was a
magic trick?! Everyone's so unique. I'm... I'm...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
I'm having so much fun! This might be just a
regular festival, but I feel like I'm at an
amusement park! I wanna do something
interesting too!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Your smile is like a blossoming flower. It
really brightens up the place. ♪

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I agree... Hehe, I'm so glad I get to have fun with
everyone. ♪
